briefdescription.para: This function is used to open and configure I2C drivers.

memberdef.argsstring: (int File, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len)
memberdef.name: XDfeSi570_I2CRdData_sub

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2C read.

memberdef.argsstring: (int File, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len)
memberdef.name: XDfeSi570_I2CWrData_sub

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2C write.
This function is used to read a status on I2C1 bus switch.
This function is used to set new status on I2C1 bus switch.

memberdef.argsstring: (int Iic, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len, u8 BusSwitchStatus)
memberdef.name: XDfeSi570_I2CRdData

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2C read.

detaileddescription.para: If attempt fails function will repeat IIC write protocol again for DELAY_100uS microseconds multiplied by a loop index number. The procedure will be repeated NUM_IIC_RETRIES times.

parameterdescription.para: File descriptor for the I2C driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (int Iic, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len, u8 BusSwitchStatus)
memberdef.name: XDfeSi570_I2CWrData

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2C write.

detaileddescription.para: If attempt fails function will repeat IIC write protocol again for DELAY_100uS microseconds multiplied by a loop index number. The procedure will be repeated NUM_IIC_RETRIES times.

briefdescription.para: This function reads current state of si570, calculates parameters for si570 MGT oscillator new frequency, writes them to si570.
This function resets PL and make it use the new clock.
This function: initialize I2C bus, reads current state of si570, calculates parameters for si570 MGT oscillator new frequency, writes them to si570 and resets PL to use the new frequency.
